Hud.Title: Map Splitter
Hud.Hint: Drag a line on the canvas to move it; right-click a line to remove it. Lines always snap to the scene grid. You can switch scene layers freely while editing.
Hud.LimitReached: Maximum of {max} parts reached. Move or remove an existing line before adding a new one.

Warn.GmOnly: Map Splitter: only a Gamemaster can split scenes.
Warn.NoScene: Map Splitter: no active scene. Open the scene you want to split first.
Warn.SquareOnly: Map Splitter: only square grids are supported in this version.
Warn.SingleLevel: Map Splitter: only scenes with exactly one level are supported.
Warn.NoBackground: Map Splitter: the active scene has no background image to slice.
Warn.AxisTooSmall: Map Splitter: the scene is too small to be cut along this axis.
Warn.NoFreePosition: Map Splitter: there is no free grid line left for a new split line on this axis.
Warn.NeedLine: Map Splitter: add at least one split line before applying.
Warn.CustomTextures: Map Splitter: the background uses custom texture offset/scale settings which are not supported. Slicing will assume the default full-fit placement.
Warn.ClickBorder: Map Splitter: click a border grid square adjacent to a linked scene.
Warn.CrossingExists: Map Splitter: this border square is already open.
Warn.CrossingMissing: Map Splitter: there is no crossing to remove on this border square.
Warn.NeighborMissing: Map Splitter: the adjacent generated scene no longer exists.

Info.CrossingAdded: Map Splitter: border crossing opened on both scenes.
Info.CrossingRemoved: Map Splitter: border crossing removed on both scenes.

Confirm.Title: Apply Split
Confirm.Content: Split the scene "{name}" into {count} new scenes? The original scene is preserved. {count} WebP images will be generated in the server folder "map-splitter".

Progress.Title: Map Splitter — Processing
Progress.Building: Recalculating walls, lights, sounds, tiles, drawings, notes and regions…
Progress.DoNotClose: Please wait — do not change scenes or close Foundry while processing.

Error.NoCuts: No valid split lines were provided.
Error.TooManyParts: The split would exceed the maximum of {max} parts.
